prediction.reasoning: The prediction is a hypothetical estimate and should not be considered financial advice. It is generated based on a simplified stochastic model (geometric Brownian motion), which assumes an annualized volatility of 30% and an annualized drift of approximately 20% for a large-cap stock like AAPL, extrapolated over 20 trading days (approximately one month). These assumptions are illustrative and not based on real-time market analysis or proprietary predictive models. The confidence intervals reflect the statistical probability of the price falling within the given ranges based on this model, acknowledging that actual stock prices are influenced by numerous unpredictable market factors and past performance is not indicative of future results.
